hubs.page_scripts:
<script src="../assets/js/library-filter.js?v=20260722a"></script>
<script>
(function() {
    var el = document.getElementById('support-email');
    if (!el) return;
    var user = el.getAttribute('data-email-user');
    var domain = el.getAttribute('data-email-domain');
    var addr = user + '@' + domain;
    el.setAttribute('href', 'mai' + 'lto:' + addr);
    el.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Email support at ' + addr);
    el.setAttribute('title', addr);
  })();
  </script>

hubs.page_scripts:
<script>
(function () {
    var input = document.getElementById('hubSearch');
    var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.hub-row'));
    var noResults = document.getElementById('hubNoResults');
    // Whole-row click opens the article (the country name stays a real link for
    // accessibility and crawlers; this just widens the tap target).
    rows.forEach(function (r) {
      r.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        if (e.target.closest('a')) return;
        var href = r.getAttribute('data-href');
        if (href) window.location.href = href;
      });
    });
    if (!input) return;
    function apply() {
      var q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      var shown = 0;
      rows.forEach(function (r) {
        var match = !q || r.getAttribute('data-name').indexOf(q) !== -1;
        r.hidden = !match;
        if (match) shown++;
      });
      if (noResults) noResults.hidden = shown !== 0;
    }
    input.addEventListener('input', apply);
  })();
  </script>

    rows.forEach(function (r) {

        if (href) window.location.href = href;

      var shown = 0;
